comments: Excellent boiler performance — exceeding PG targets. Minor concern: turbine bearing vibration needs monitoring. Thermax service team responds within 24 hours which is good.

Boiler performance acceptable but turbine output shortfall is a concern. Waiting for resolution from Thermax/Triveni. Service response time could be faster — 48 hours for non-critical issues is too long.
Boiler and ESP running well overall. Noticed ESP dust readings creeping up — raised with Thermax who scheduled inspection. Good proactive monitoring via Edelise platform.
Process heaters performing well. Thermax maintenance team is knowledgeable. Would appreciate faster availability of spare parts — some items take 4-6 weeks.
Outstanding service on thermic fluid heater. Maintenance completed ahead of schedule. TF analysis report was very detailed and actionable. Best equipment vendor we work with.
Pre-installation survey — haven't started yet. Impressed with Thermax proposal and technical presentation. Looking forward to project execution.
ZLD project not yet commissioned but project management has been excellent so far. Thermax team is very responsive and professional. Chemical AMC pricing is competitive.
